name: Cypress Lakes Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Cypress Lakes Country Club in Destrehan, LA! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, water, youth programming, and restrooms. You can reserve the courts. The courts are private.

name: Grand Ridge Country Club
description: Grand Ridge Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Luling, LA. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: West Bank Bridge Park
description: West Bank Bridge Park is a place to play pickleball in Luling, LA. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.
